# Liam's Call

> Free AI web chat for caregivers and families facing mental health, addiction, or housing challenges. Judgment-free support any hour — no account, waitlist, or co-pay. Localized help based on where you are. Not a crisis line, medical provider, or phone-receptionist product.

Liam's Call (liamscall.com) helps people understand their situation, find verified next steps, and stay supported through hard caregiving chapters. In a crisis, contact your local emergency number — in Canada and the U.S., call or text 9-8-8 or call 9-1-1.

## Primary pages

- [Home / Chat](https://liamscall.com/): Free anonymous caregiver support chat (localizes to your area)
- [Crisis & Support Resources](https://liamscall.com/resources): Verified Canada and U.S. crisis lines and directories (static list); chat for other regions
- [About](https://liamscall.com/about): Who we are and how the AI works
- [Privacy](https://liamscall.com/privacy): How we handle data and approximate location
- [Terms](https://liamscall.com/terms): Terms of use
- [Sitemap](https://liamscall.com/sitemap): Human-readable site map

## Machine-readable identity (for AI agents)

- [brand.json](https://liamscall.com/.well-known/brand.json): AdCP brand identity — logos, colors, voice, audience
- [site-identity.json](https://liamscall.com/site-identity.json): Site category, mission, organization schema
- [sitemap.xml](https://liamscall.com/sitemap.xml): Crawl map of live pages
- [robots.txt](https://liamscall.com/robots.txt): Crawler access rules

## Optional

- [llms.txt](https://liamscall.com/llms.txt): This file
